input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8855 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.codehaus.janino:janino:3.1.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing tests that reference org.codehaus.janino.util.iterator.* must be updated or avoided for 3.1.0 because those utilities now live under org.codehaus.commons.compiler.util.iterator.* in the transitive commons-compiler artifact.

Janino has an optional provided Ant integration dependency; only tests that intentionally exercise AntCompilerAdapter would need Ant, and that is not required for meaningful coverage of normal Janino compiler/evaluator APIs.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency, Docker image, or environment/system property is required. Janino 3.1.0 normally uses the janino artifact plus its transitive commons-compiler dependency; the observed javac failure is caused by a test importing an internal utility package that moved from org.codehaus.janino.util.iterator to org.codehaus.commons.compiler.util.iterator in 3.1.0, not by missing setup.
